(e.g. `"Info"`, `"Error"`), matching `core::gelf::message::Level`.

TraceSummaryBreakdownEntry.description:
One row in `TracesSummaryResult.breakdown`: the contribution of one direct
child of the root span to the trace's wall-clock time.

group_by.description:
When set to `"name"`, results are aggregated into `groups`; otherwise
individual spans are returned in `spans`.

TracesSlowResult.title: TracesSlowResult
TracesSlowResult.description:
`traces.slow` returns either an ungrouped list of spans or a grouped
aggregation, depending on the `group_by` parameter. Both shapes are
expressed as optional fields on the same result struct.

session.description: Defaults to the calling session when omitted.

SessionInfo.description: One entry in a `session.list` or `status.get` response.
One entry in a `session.list` or `status.get` response.

StoreStats.description: Pipeline buffer / receive statistics. Embedded in `status.get`.

client_info.description:
Caller-supplied identity/metadata. The daemon currently records and ignores
this field; size validation lands in Task 11.

oneshot.description:
New in v1; mirrors the `oneshot` param on `triggers.add`. Tells the
client this is the only fire it will see for this trigger ID.

context_before.description:
Context entries that arrived before the matched_entry. Size at most
`notify_context`.
